case_title: DAVID DO NGUYEN VS. FRANK G. CHARLTON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY NGUYEN, DAVID DO CHARLTON, FRANK G.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S SON HUY NGUYEN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/VIETNAMESE - VIETNAMESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DAVID DO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARLTON, FRANK G. $1,602.79 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,682.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
